Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."name" = $1::text AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($2::uuid[])) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.base"."budget" AS "budget") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
